# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This repository is a dependency-light browser roguelike with a phone-first UI.

- Runtime source of truth is `src/`.
- `index.html` loads `src/main.js` in normal browser use and `app.js` only for `file://` fallback.
- `app.js` is generated by `npm run build`; do not edit it as primary source.
- Keep changes in the smallest owning module instead of spreading logic across `src/game.js` and feature files.
- Preserve the current data-driven style in `src/data/content.js` and `src/features/*.js`.
- If a new runtime module is added, update `scripts/build-app.mjs`.
- If save payload shape changes, update migration logic in `src/features/persistence.js`.
- Preserve mobile readability, touch controls, controller flows, and `data-action`/DOM selectors unless the task explicitly changes them.
- For verification, prefer:
  - `npm run build`
  - `npm run test:rules`
  - `npm run playtest:harness`

Read `AGENTS.md` and `docs/ai/PROJECT_BRIEF.md` before large changes.
